faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Carle Place?
faqs.answer: Carle Place's location on Long Island, with its mix of residential areas and proximity to green spaces, makes it attractive to brown marmorated stink bugs seeking overwintering sites. These pests are drawn to the warmth of homes and buildings during fall, entering through small cracks and gaps around windows, doors, and siding.

faqs.question: What does your stink bug control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection to identify entry points and harborage areas, targeted treatment using professional-grade products, sealing of common entry points, removal of visible stink bugs, and preventative measures to stop future infestations. We also provide guidance on exclusion techniques specific to your property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a stink bug problem in Carle Place?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Carle Place locations. Stink bug problems can escalate quickly, especially during peak season, so we prioritize rapid response to prevent these pests from establishing large populations inside your walls and attic spaces.

faqs.question: Is the treatment safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We focus on targeted treatments and integrated pest management strategies that minimize chemical use while maximizing effectiveness against stink bugs.
